nasb.text: I looked, and behold, the fruitful land was a wilderness, And all its cities were pulled down Before the Lord, before His fierce anger.

esv.text: I looked, and behold, the fruitful land was a desert, and all its cities were laid in ruins before the Lord, before his fierce anger.

cnv.text: 我觀看，肥美田園變為荒野； 在耶和華面前，就是在他烈怒之下， 所有的城市都被拆毀。

ccb.text: 我四下观看，只见良田变荒野， 城邑都在耶和华的烈怒下沦为废墟。
